title: Output Schema for ASB Inbound Variable
description: Schema for the structured message variable set by the ASB inbound endpoint.

timeToLive.description: Duration after which the message expires.

deliveryCount.description: Number of times delivery has been attempted.

enqueuedTime.description: UTC time when the message was enqueued.

sequenceNumber.description: Unique sequence number assigned by Service Bus.

deadLetterSource.description: Original entity name if the message was dead-lettered.

lockedUntil.description: UTC time when the message lock expires (PEEK_LOCK mode only).

expiresAt.description: UTC time when the message expires.

scheduledEnqueueTime.description: Scheduled delivery time for scheduled messages.

deadLetterReason.description: Reason the message was dead-lettered (only when consuming from a dead-letter queue).

deadLetterErrorDescription.description: Error description for dead-lettered messages (only when consuming from a dead-letter queue).

contentType.description: Content type of the message body.

replyTo.description: Address of the entity to reply to.

replyToSessionId.description: Session identifier to use when replying to a session-enabled entity.

additionalProperties.description: Application properties set by the sender.
